title: Opening for Software Engineer at Lybrate

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Lybrate
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
